message: Hey, I heard you joined a new club. What's it about?
Yeah, it's the environmental club. We're working on projects to help make the school more eco-friendly.
That's awesome! What kind of projects are you working on?
Right now, we're focusing on a recycling initiative and planning a community garden.
Sounds like a lot of fun. Let me know if you need any help!
Definitely! We could use all the hands we can get. Thanks!
